query:
SELECT 
  id,
  gameDate,
  awayTeam,
  homeTeam,
  sport,
  -- Book odds
  bookTotal,
  overOdds,
  underOdds,
  awayML,
  homeML,
  awayRunLine,
  awayRunLineOdds,
  homeRunLine,
  homeRunLineOdds,
  -- Model outputs
  modelTotal,
  modelOverRate,
  modelUnderRate,
  modelOverOdds,
  modelUnderOdds,
  modelAwayWinPct,
  modelHomeWinPct,
  modelAwayML,
  modelHomeML,
  modelAwayPLOdds,
  modelHomePLOdds,
  modelAwaySpreadOdds,
  modelHomeSpreadOdds,
  modelRunAt,
  -- Score projections
  modelAwayScore,
  modelHomeScore
FROM games
WHERE gameDate = '2026-05-14' AND sport = 'NHL'
ORDER BY gameTime ASC;
